conversation.content:
Reconcile the following columns. Document has 14 pages. Sources are anonymous (A and B).

COLUMNS:

---
Column 1: Median OS (mo) | Overall | Treatment
Definition: What is the median overall survival (in months) for all patients in the experimental arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="76.6" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="In the abiraterone trial, median overall survival was 76.6 months (95% CI 67·8–86.9) in the abiraterone group."
  B: value="76.6 months" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="From Page 1, 'Findings' section, 'In the abiraterone trial, median overall survival was 76.6 months (95% CI 67.8–86.9) in the abiraterone group'."

---
Column 2: Median OS (mo) | Overall | Control
Definition: What is the median overall survival (in months) for all patients in the control arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="45.7" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="In the abiraterone trial, median overall survival was ... versus 45.7 months (41.6-52-0) in the standard of care group."
  B: value="45.7 months" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="From Page 1, 'Findings' section, 'versus 45.7 months (41.6–52.0) in the standard of care group'."

---
Column 3: Median OS (mo) | High volume | Treatment
Definition: What is the median overall survival (in months) for patients with high volume metastasis (by CHAARTED criteria) in the experimental arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="56" | page=8 | modality=figure | reasoning="Figure 3E, 'High-volume disease', 'Abiraterone trial', 'Study drug treatment' row shows a median overall survival of 56 months."
  B: value="56 months" | page=8 | modality=figure | reasoning="From Page 8, Figure 3E, 'High-volume disease Abiraterone trial', 'Standard of care plus abiraterone' arm."

---
Column 4: Median OS (mo) | High volume | Control
Definition: What is the median overall survival (in months) for patients with high volume metastasis (by CHAARTED criteria) in the control arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.

---

Definition: What is the median progression free survival (in months) for all patients in the experimental arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
